The '''''Gallofree''''' was an [[Airam (group)|Airam]]-owned [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7 Factory]] located in the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]].

==History==
In approximately [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Airam Clans]] joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and allowed them to transfer the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor]] ''[[Compellor]]''{{'s}} [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] to the modified [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|''Peregrine'']].<ref name="X-Wing" />

During this procedure, the factory came under attack twice by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], first a comparatively small [[Attack on the Compellor|scout group]], then another, [[First attack on the Peregrine|larger one]].<ref name="X-Wing" />

It was eventually attacked a [[Retreat from Gallofree|third time]] by a strike group consisting of two Star Destroyers and three Corvettes, which forced the Rebel Alliance to abandon the factory.<ref name="X-Wing" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
